info.title: LDS Stake Portal API
info.description: REST API for the LDS Stake management portal. Endpoints are organized by domain: authentication, user management, callings, HC assignments, speaking schedule, calling proposals (Kanban), ward info, and service health.

get.description:
Lists "all" users in the system.

If the caller is authenticated, returns all users.
If not authenticated, returns public users only.

post.description:
Endpoint to upload a photo for a user.

Accepts a single image file upload, validates the content-type, saves the
file under the backend static/profile_images directory and updates the
user's `profile_image` to the proxied URL (`/api/static/profile_images/<file>`).

If `user_id` is provided, uploads for that user (requires MANAGE_USERS permission
unless uploading for self). If omitted, uploads for the authenticated user.

get.description:
Endpoint to get all callings.
Supports query parameters for filtering and pagination.

Authenticated users can see all callings,
while anonymous users can only see callings that are marked as public.

post.description:
Endpoint to create a new calling.
Expects a JSON body with the calling details.
The calling name must be unique.

get.description:
Endpoint to get a specific calling by its ID.
Authenticated users can access all callings,
while anonymous users can only access callings that are marked as public.

put.description:
Endpoint to update an existing calling.
Expects a JSON body with the updated calling details.
System-defined callings cannot be modified.
The calling name must be unique if it's being updated.

delete.description:
Endpoint to delete a calling by its ID.
System-defined callings cannot be deleted.

get.description:
Endpoint to get the user assigned to a specific calling slot.
Authenticated users can access all slots,
while anonymous users can only access slots for callings that are marked as public.

put.description:
Endpoint to assign a specific slot to a calling.
Expects a JSON body with the user ID to assign to the slot.
Cannot assign a slot that is already filled.

delete.description: Endpoint to unassign a specific slot from a calling.

get.description:
Endpoint to get the speaking schedule for the high council.
Returns the schedule for the entire year, including overrides.

Endpoint to get the speaking schedule for a specific year.
Returns the schedule for the given year, including overrides.

put.description:
Endpoint to add an override to the speaking schedule.
This will allow an administrator to change the assigned ward for a given month and high councilor.

get.description:
Endpoint to get the speaking topics for a specific year.
Returns a list of topics for the given year.

put.description:
Endpoint to update the speaking topic for a specific month and year.
Allows an administrator to set or update the speaking topic and reference material for a given month.

schema.title: Response List Proposals Calling Kanban Proposals Get

get.description: Get a specific calling proposal by ID

post.description: Add a comment to a calling proposal

get.description: Get all comments for a calling proposal

patch.description: Change an existing approval (approve/reject) for a calling proposal

post.description: Schedule an interview for a calling proposal

get.description: Get interview for a calling proposal

post.description: Mark an interview as completed for a calling proposal
Mark sustaining as completed for a calling proposal
Mark a calling proposal as set apart (finalized)
Mark proposal as updated in LCR

get.description: Get kanban board view with proposals grouped by stage
Return a single ward by id.

Assignment.title: Assignment
Assignment.description:
Represents an assignment with an associated high councilor.

- `id`: primary key (int)
- `high_councilor_id`: foreign key to `usercalling.id`
- `responsibility`: nullable comma-separated string
- `committee`: nullable comma-separated string
